data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: All AC verify commands pass (10/10). CHECKPOINT 6/6: Task complete. Added references in brainstorm/SKILL.md, fix-bug/SKILL.md, implementation-plan/SKILL.md. Removed RED markers from .test-index. All 8 tests GREEN.
